rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.001 governs political contribution and expenditure disclosure—unrelated subject matter, no overlap.
quote: Sec. 253.001. CONTRIBUTION OR EXPENDITURE IN ANOTHER'S NAME PROHIBITED.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code contribution disclosure rules.
